do_not_guess: office hours not stated in the curated bundle
who specifically will take the case unless the source says so
exact case value, results, or whether representation will be offered
firm policies or fees beyond publicly stated free consultation and contingency-fee messaging

sources.label: Homepage
facts: Dermer Appel Ruder presents itself as a Georgia personal injury firm based in Norcross, Georgia.
The homepage says the firm serves clients in Cobb, Gwinnett, DeKalb, and Fulton Counties and states that it serves cities throughout Georgia.
The site says the partners previously worked as insurance defense attorneys for a combined 80 years before representing injured Georgians.
The homepage says consultations are free, confidential, and no-obligation.
The public practice list on the homepage includes car accidents, commercial truck accidents, nursing home abuse, serious injuries, slip and fall injuries, and wrongful death.
The site says clients work with a dedicated lead attorney rather than a case manager or paralegal.
The homepage says personal injury clients do not pay attorney fees unless the firm is successful and that fees are handled on a contingency basis.

sources.label: About page
facts: The about page says the firm helps injury clients pursue compensation and uses prior insurance-defense experience to understand how insurance companies work.
The page highlights attentive legal representation, millions recovered, and 80-plus years of experience on the clients' side.
The firm describes itself as partnership-based and says clients work directly with a lead attorney instead of a case manager.
The public about page again lists car accidents, commercial truck accidents, nursing home abuse, serious injuries, slip and fall injuries, and wrongful death as example case types.

sources.label: Attorneys page
facts: The attorneys page lists Adam Appel as a partner, Kim Ruder as a partner, and Stephen Dermer as retired.
The page repeats the firm's message that the partners spent years working as insurance defense attorneys before fighting for injured clients.

The site shows public case-result examples including premise liability, intersection accident, burn injuries, and pedestrian accident results, but Evie should not imply those outcomes predict any new matter.

sources.label: Contact page
facts: The contact page invites visitors to request a free consultation.
The public phone number shown is 404-892-8884.
The public address shown is 708 Holcomb Bridge Rd., Norcross, GA 30071.
The contact page says one of the firm's attorneys will contact the visitor after the form is submitted.
The site includes a disclaimer that website information is for general information only, is not legal advice, and does not create an attorney-client relationship.
